market_context.headline: Strait of Hormuz disruptions drive prices higher
market_context.detail: Brent settled above $100/bbl for the first time since Sept 2023. Petroleum shipments through the Strait of Hormuz have fallen sharply, with some Middle East production shut-in. EIA forecasts prices above $95/bbl for the next two months before easing below $80/bbl in Q3.
